title: Fix pod status reporting for new Exited state

comments.body: LGTM (although I miss a commit message)

Don't merge yet - working on this one to solve some integration test
failures we're seeing (local, not on CI), and this hasn't quite managed to
fix them yet. I'll rename to WIP when I get to my desk.
